final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cinematic-still
Asset type: concept art for film or game, ultra-wide panoramic
Primary request: futuristic cyberpunk night scene of a hyper-advanced Shibuya Crossing in Tokyo
Scene/backdrop: towering skyscrapers covered in dense holographic billboards, wet streets reflecting neon lights, flying vehicles in the sky
Subject: dense crowd of pedestrians mixed with humanoid androids, some wearing AR glasses and luminescent avant-garde clothing, aerial drones and flying taxis with orange exhaust trails
Style/medium: cinematic digital art, film-grade rendering, photorealistic with stylized neon saturation
Composition/framing: ultra-wide fisheye lens perspective, extreme low angle looking up at skyscrapers, deep depth of field with layered foreground-midground-background
Lighting/mood: harsh artificial neon lighting from holographic screens, blue-purple and orange-red color cast, dramatic high-contrast shadows, oppressive yet energetic atmosphere
Color palette: dominant electric blue and violet + warm orange and crimson accents + deep blacks + reflective wet surface highlights
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror-like reflections, holographic screen glow, luminescent fabric textures, metallic android surfaces, glass and steel architecture
Text (verbatim): "日文、英文、中文霓虹字符"
Constraints: maintain the fisheye distortion effect, preserve the dense layered composition of crowd and architecture, keep the wet ground reflections accurate
Avoid: daylight or natural sunlight, clean dry streets, sparse minimalist composition, cheerful bright mood, low-detail crowd rendering, watermark
